vision_report.compositional_truth_check: The registry is largely non-representative of the current visual data. P1 (String of Nickels), P2 (Mexican Mint), and P4 (Silver Guest) are not visible as established specimens. Only P3 (Pothos/Rabbit anchor) shows a singular, struggling sprout.

inventory_reconciliation.P1: Systemic Loss: No plant matter detected in yellow pot.
inventory_reconciliation.P2: Systemic Loss: No plant matter detected in black pot.
inventory_reconciliation.P3: Partial Presence: Single sprout/seedling remains; Pothos foliage absent.
inventory_reconciliation.P4: Systemic Loss: No plant matter detected.

plant_audit.P1: Empty soil surface; no signs of life.
plant_audit.P2: Empty soil surface; no signs of life.
plant_audit.P3: Contains a single, thin, green sprout. The white rabbit anchor is present, confirming this is the P3 location.
plant_audit.P4: Merged with P2/P3 area; no distinct specimen identified.

biome_observations.soil_texture: Soil appears dark and consistently damp across all pots.
biome_observations.debris: White granular material (likely perlite or mineral supplement) is present in the P3 pot.
biome_observations.surface_anomalies: No fungal growth or secondary weeds detected; the environment appears sterile or dormant.

temporal_deltas.earliest_to_t4: Initial state shows a small green sprout in P3. P1 and P2 are already devoid of visible foliage.
temporal_deltas.t4_to_current: The sprout in P3 shows minimal postural change, maintaining a slight vertical orientation. No new growth or decay observed in other pots.

vision_report.visual_health_inference: The biome is in a state of critical failure. The lack of established foliage suggests a total loss of the original registry specimens. The single sprout in P3 is the only indicator of biological activity, though it is insufficient to sustain the registry's claims.
vision_report.anomalies: The presence of a single sprout in an otherwise empty set of pots suggests a failed propagation or a recent germination attempt that is struggling to establish.
vision_report.narrative_description: I have performed a multi-stage audit of the provided image sequence. The registry provided is not reflected in the physical reality of the desk. The pots are effectively empty, save for a single, fragile sprout in the P3 container. The environment appears to be a 'ghost' biome where the original plants have been lost, leaving only the structural anchors (pots and rabbit figurine) behind. The soil moisture levels appear stable, but the lack of photosynthetic mass indicates a severe health deficit.
